mapper.select: select id, lock_version as version, doc_no, title, content, latest_revision, latest_snapshot_ref, latest_snapshot_revision, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from collaborative_document order by updated_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}

select d.id, d.lock_version as version, d.doc_no, d.title, d.content, d.latest_revision, d.latest_snapshot_ref, d.latest_snapshot_revision, d.created_by, d.updated_by, d.created_at, d.updated_at from collaborative_document d inner join collaborative_document_member m on m.document_id = d.id where m.member_id = #{memberId} order by d.updated_at desc, d.id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update collaborative_document set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, latest_revision = #{nextRevision}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, lock_version = lock_version + 1 where id = #{id} and latest_revision = #{expectedRevision}

update collaborative_document set latest_snapshot_ref = #{latestSnapshotRef}, latest_snapshot_revision = #{latestSnapshotRevision}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, lock_version = lock_version + 1 where id = #{id}
